excerpt: Hi Robert, Im pretty sure im not the first (as shown by posts) and surely not the last but hope you can add the QT-07S soil sensor before the end of summer so I can really finish making the garden smart before it starts raining cats and dogs again in the Netherlands (and my irrigation is not that needed anymore).
